## Outcome

Describe the user-visible or evidence-visible outcome.

## Why

Explain the problem and the entrant-owned decision behind this change.

## Proof

- [ ] Tests added or updated
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Unsafe/adversarial case exercised where relevant
- [ ] Install/rollback exercised where relevant

## Hackathon evidence

- [ ] `BUILD_LOG.md` updated
- [ ] `DECISIONS.md` or architecture updated when judgment changed
- [ ] Codex and GPT-5.6 contribution accurately described
- [ ] No planned behavior is presented as implemented
- [ ] No undisclosed pre-period code was imported

## Security and data

- [ ] No secrets, credentials, real user data, or local databases committed
- [ ] New third-party code/assets have compatible licenses and notices
